calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Joyce D. Long, CSR #8620. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2003 Continued To May-12-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/19/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
